items.title: ReMarkable Paper Pure Tablet Review: Back to Basics
items.summary: After six years, the ReMarkable 2 gets a replacement in the form of the ReMarkable Paper Pure.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: The Remarkable Paper Pure is the best digital notepad I’ve ever used
items.summary: Was I writing with pen and paper, or a stylus on a tablet? It’s getting more difficult than ever to tell. The Remarkable Paper Pure is a follow-up to 2020’s Remarkable 2 and a c...

items.title: reMarkable’s new Paper Pure tablet goes back to basics with a monochrome screen
items.summary: The new Paper Pure is lighter and faster than the reMarkable 2, which is going to be retired six years since its launch.
